items.title: 1. What are cookies
items.content: Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit a website.

items.title: 2. Categories we use
items.content: Strictly necessary, performance/analytics, functional and marketing cookies.

items.title: 3. Third-party cookies
items.content: We may use Google Analytics and similar privacy-respecting tools.

items.title: 4. Managing cookies
items.content: You can disable cookies via your browser settings.

items.title: 5. Updates
items.content: This policy is updated whenever we change the cookies we use.
